title: Sticky Savory Italian Cheese Lasagna
description: A fermented, gooey, midnight-craving Italian dish featuring vegan white wine vinegar and ferment-jang, jain-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine the vegan ricotta cheese, vegan white wine vinegar, and ferment-jang.
Spread a layer of marinara sauce in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the ricotta cheese mixture over the noodles.
Sprinkle with half of the vegan mozzarella shreds.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the sauce, then the remaining ricotta cheese mixture, and finally the remaining mozzarella shreds.
Top with chopped fresh basil and drizzle with olive oil.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
